description_long: This object appears to represent a distorted adult pedestrian figure, with elongated and stretched limbs and body parts. The head is discernible with textured hair, while the torso and limbs are unnaturally extended and twisted, giving the figure a surreal, fragmented appearance. The surface texture is inconsistent, with some areas appearing smooth and others rough, and the overall form is highly irregular. The figure seems to be wearing clothing, but the details are obscured by the severe geometric distortions. The asset's proportions are not anatomically correct, and the extremities are exaggerated in length and shape. The object does not appear to be carrying any accessories or objects.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a fragmented, surreal form. The head and hair are visible, but the body is unnaturally stretched and twisted.
description_view_0: The figure's head and upper body are visible, with limbs stretched out in multiple directions and a chaotic, fragmented appearance.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the extreme elongation of the limbs and the twisted torso, with the head partially visible.
description_view_2: This view shows the figure from behind, highlighting the wide, flat extensions and the irregular, stretched lower body.
description_view_3: The head and upper back are prominent, with the limbs and body appearing even more distorted and fragmented from this angle.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve top and pants with undefined style due to distortion
attribute_posture: contorted and stretched, with limbs extended in unnatural directions
